wikitext.*:
The '''{{PAGENAME}}''' (and '''Champion''') are the trainers that the player must defeat to become the Rijon Champion. They are located in the [[Rijon League]] ([[Talrus Heights]] in [[Rijon Adventures]]), and can only be challenged after collecting 8 [[Badge|Gym Badges]]. ==Pokémon Brown== === 2024 version Elite Four === The levels shown below are when initially fighting the Elite Four. After the Elite Four is beaten once, all of their teams will become Level 100, and Redd's Rapidash will know Giga Impact in place of Take Down. {{Party/Header |Sprite=Brown-Redd.png |Name=Redd |Location=Rijon League |Prize= ??? |Pokemon=6}} {{Party/Pokemon |Pokemon 1 Image = {{Icon|Rapidash}} |Pokemon 1 Name = Rapidash |Pokemon 1 Level = 59 |Pokemon 1 Move 1 = Poison Jab |Pokemon 1 Move 2 = Take Down |Pokemon 1 Move 3 = Megahorn |Pokemon 1 Move 4 = Fire Blast |Pokemon 2 Image = {{Icon|Ninetales}} |Pokemon 2 Name = Ninetales |Pokemon 2 Level = 57 |Pokemon 2 Move 1 = Hypnosis |Pokemon 2 Move 2 = Dream Eater |Pokemon 2 Move 3 = Noise Pulse |Pokemon 2 Move 4 = Fire Blast}} {{Party/Pokemon |Pokemon 1 Image = {{Icon|Flareon}} |Pokemon 1 Name = Flareon |Pokemon 1 Level = 59 |Pokemon 1 Move 1 = Focus Energy |Pokemon 1 Move 2 = Fire Spin |Pokemon 1 Move 3 = Burning Mist |Pokemon 1 Move 4 = Fire Blast |Pokemon 2 Image = {{Icon|Arcanine}} |Pokemon 2 Name = Arcanine |Pokemon 2 Level = 60 |Pokemon 2 Move 1 = ExtremeSpeed |Pokemon 2 Move 2 = Skull Bash |Pokemon 2 Move 3 = Toxic |Pokemon 2 Move 4 = Fire Blast}} {{Party/Pokemon |Pokemon 1 Image = {{Icon|Typhlosion}} |Pokemon 1 Name = Typhlosion |Pokemon 1 Level = 61 |Pokemon 1 Move 1 = Smokescreen |Pokemon 1 Move 2 = Play Rough |Pokemon 1 Move 3 = Rollout |Pokemon 1 Move 4 = Fire Blast |Pokemon 2 Image = {{Icon|Magmortar}} |Pokemon 2 Name = Magmortar |Pokemon 2 Level = 60 |Pokemon 2 Move 1 = Cross Chop |Pokemon 2 Move 2 = Fire Punch |Pokemon 2 Move 3 = Miasma |Pokemon 2 Move 4 = Fire Blast}} |}

Trainer item: Max Potion

{{BattleDialogue |Welcome, Trainer! What you've experienced on your journey is unique. Anyone could conquer the Gyms and traverse Seneca Caverns, but no one would have done it as you have. You're as unique as a crystalized snowflake fluttering and tumbling through the cold mountain air on a winter's morning. I am Yuki, the Master Ice Trainer of Naljo and your first opponent in the Rijon League. Put your best foot forward! |What a way to break the ice! |My outlasting and overcoming my icy onslaught, you've proven that you and your Pokémon can withstand anything! Go onto the next room, your next challenge awaits. }}

Trainer item: Max Potion

{{BattleDialogue |How ya doin' Trainer? Or should I say... CHALLENGER! There we go, that has a better sound to it. I'm Sora, the flying Pokémon Trainer of the Rijon League! You've made it past the first gate, but it's only going to get more difficult from here on out, buck-o! Try not to get blown away by my sheer power! |I'm breathless! |Seriously, not many Trainers can overpower me, but I'm glad, you got a good vibe. If you've defeated me, then you and your Pokémon have the inner strength and power to overcome the challenges of the League. Congratulations, challenger! Move on to your next opponent. }}


{{Party/HeaderPrism |Sprite=Daichi.png |Class=Elite Four |Name=Daichi |Location=Rijon League |Prize=6000 |Pokemon=5}} {{Party/Pokemon |Pokemon 1 Image = {{Icon|Rhydon}} |Pokemon 1 Name = Rhydon |Pokemon 1 Gender = {{Male}} |Pokemon 1 Level = 56 |Pokemon 1 Ability = Rock Head |Pokemon 1 Move 1 = Iron Tail |Pokemon 1 Move 2 = Substitute |Pokemon 1 Move 3 = Megahorn |Pokemon 1 Move 4 = Earthquake |Pokemon 2 Image = {{Icon|Steelix}} |Pokemon 2 Name = Steelix |Pokemon 2 Gender = {{Male}} |Pokemon 2 Level = 56 |Pokemon 2 Ability = Sturdy |Pokemon 2 Move 1 = Body Slam |Pokemon 2 Move 2 = Sandstorm |Pokemon 2 Move 3 = Iron Tail |Pokemon 2 Move 4 = Earthquake}} {{Party/Pokemon |Pokemon 1 Image = {{Icon|Donphan}} |Pokemon 1 Name = Donphan |Pokemon 1 Gender = {{Male}} |Pokemon 1 Level = 58 |Pokemon 1 Ability = Sturdy |Pokemon 1 Move 1 = Rollout |Pokemon 1 Move 2 = Sandstorm |Pokemon 1 Move 3 = Flail |Pokemon 1 Move 4 = Earthquake |Pokemon 2 Image = {{Icon|Flygon}} |Pokemon 2 Name = Flygon |Pokemon 2 Gender = {{Male}} |Pokemon 2 Level = 58 |Pokemon 2 Ability = Levitate |Pokemon 2 Move 1 = Dragon Claw |Pokemon 2 Move 2 = Crunch |Pokemon 2 Move 3 = Screech |Pokemon 2 Move 4 = Earthquake}} {{Party/Pokemon3 |Pokemon 1 Image = {{Icon|Rhyperior}} |Pokemon 1 Name = Rhyperior |Pokemon 1 Gender = {{Male}} |Pokemon 1 Level = 60 |Pokemon 1 Ability = Solid Rock |Pokemon 1 Move 1 = Iron Tail |Pokemon 1 Move 2 = Substitute |Pokemon 1 Move 3 = Megahorn |Pokemon 1 Move 4 = Earthquake}} |}

Trainer item: Max Potion

{{BattleDialogue |The ground we walk has been shared by many who have come before us. There were challengers and champions before you and I, and once we're gone there will continue to be more. Our existence appears to be insignificant in comparison to the seemingly timeless floor beneath our feet. To be solid like the ground is to be eternal. To be solid is to change the nature of our ephemeral existence; and to do that, temporary beings like you and I must cherish the beauty of the present. Ground yourself in this moment, do not falter! |To be grounded is to be balanced, and to be balanced is to understand the difference between the reckless nature of sheer power and the discipline needed to resist all opposition. |You have one more opponent before you can contest the title of Champion. Best wishes to you. }}


{{Party/HeaderPrism |Sprite=Mura.png |Class=Elite Four |Name=Mura |Location=Rijon League |Prize=6000 |Pokemon=6}} {{Party/Pokemon |Pokemon 1 Image = {{Icon|Fearow}} |Pokemon 1 Name = Fearow |Pokemon 1 Gender = {{Male}} |Pokemon 1 Level = 58 |Pokemon 1 Ability = Keen Eye |Pokemon 1 Move 1 = Sky Attack |Pokemon 1 Move 2 = Whirlwind |Pokemon 1 Move 3 = Agility |Pokemon 1 Move 4 = Drill Peck |Pokemon 2 Image = {{Icon|Tyranitar}} |Pokemon 2 Name = Tyranitar |Pokemon 2 Gender = {{Male}} |Pokemon 2 Level = 58 |Pokemon 2 Ability = Sand Stream |Pokemon 2 Move 1 = Earthquake |Pokemon 2 Move 2 = Crunch |Pokemon 2 Move 3 = ''(none)'' |Pokemon 2 Move 4 = ''(none)''}} {{Party/Pokemon |Pokemon 1 Image = {{Icon|Ludicolo}} |Pokemon 1 Name = Ludicolo |Pokemon 1 Gender = {{Male}} |Pokemon 1 Level = 59 |Pokemon 1 Ability = Swift Swim |Pokemon 1 Move 1 = Hydro Pump |Pokemon 1 Move 2 = Giga Drain |Pokemon 1 Move 3 = Rest |Pokemon 1 Move 4 = Sleep Talk |Pokemon 2 Image = {{Icon|Houndoom}} |Pokemon 2 Name = Houndoom |Pokemon 2 Gender = {{Male}} |Pokemon 2 Level = 59 |Pokemon 2 Ability = Early Bird |Pokemon 2 Move 1 = Flamethrower |Pokemon 2 Move 2 = Crunch |Pokemon 2 Move 3 = Roar |Pokemon 2 Move 4 = Sunny Day}} {{Party/Pokemon |Pokemon 1 Image = {{Icon|Weezing}} |Pokemon 1 Name = Weezing |Pokemon 1 Gender = {{Male}} |Pokemon 1 Level = 60 |Pokemon 1 Ability = Levitate |Pokemon 1 Move 1 = {{M|Nerve Gas}} |Pokemon 1 Move 2 = Mustard Gas |Pokemon 1 Move 3 = Sludge Bomb |Pokemon 1 Move 4 = Explosion |Pokemon 2 Image = {{Icon|Leafeon}} |Pokemon 2 Name = Leafeon |Pokemon 2 Level = 60 |Pokemon 2 Gender = {{Male}} |Pokemon 2 Ability = Leaf Guard |Pokemon 2 Move 1 = Sunny Day |Pokemon 2 Move 2 = Solarbeam |Pokemon 2 Move 3 = Synthesis |Pokemon 2 Move 4 = Razor Leaf}} |}

Trainer item: Max Potion

{{BattleDialogue |Whoa there, a Challenger? I didn't see that coming. Usually people either get beaten by Sora or put to sleep by Daichi's meditation lesson. But that's what being a Trainer is all about! Expecting the unexpected and adapting to any given situation. A Trainer must be able to know when to push for a victory or pull back to spare your Pokémon from injury. When I was a challenger for the Rijon Champion title, I couldn't adapt to my opponents' varied and unique Pokémon. My inability to change up my strategy is ultimately what cost me the title. Let's see if you have what it takes! I won't make this easy! |I'm simply amazed. You battle just like that Trainer! Well, I guess that means you have what it takes to be the Champion of Rijon. |Before you enter that room, take a moment to reflect on your journey and your growth. You are no longer the person you were when you started your adventure. The trials of the Elite Four proved that you have all the qualities of a Champion. You are disciplined, you are powerful, you are balanced, and you can adapt to any situation. }} ====Champion==== {{Party/HeaderPrism |Sprite=Lance.png |Class=Champion |Name=Lance |Location=Rijon League |Prize=6500 |Pokemon=6}} {{Party/Pokemon |Pokemon 1 Image = {{Icon|Salamence}} |Pokemon 1 Name = Salamence |Pokemon 1 Gender = {{Male}} |Pokemon 1 Level = 61 |Pokemon 1 Ability = Intimidate |Pokemon 1 Move 1 = Dragon Claw |Pokemon 1 Move 2 = Flamethrower |Pokemon 1 Move 3 = Shadow Claw |Pokemon 1 Move 4 = Rest |Pokemon 2 Image = {{Icon|Gyarados}} |Pokemon 2 Name = Gyarados |Pokemon 2 Gender = {{Male}} |Pokemon 2 Level = 61 |Pokemon 2 Ability = Intimidate |Pokemon 2 Move 1 = Outrage |Pokemon 2 Move 2 = Waterfall |Pokemon 2 Move 3 = Thunder Wave |Pokemon 2 Move 4 = Crunch}} {{Party/Pokemon |Pokemon 1 Image = {{Icon|Garchomp}} |Pokemon 1 Name = Garchomp |Pokemon 1 Gender = {{Male}} |Pokemon 1 Level = 63 |Pokemon 1 Ability = Sand Veil |Pokemon 1 Move 1 = Outrage |Pokemon 1 Move 2 = Swords Dance |Pokemon 1 Move 3 = Earthquake |Pokemon 1 Move 4 = Roar |Pokemon 2 Image = {{Icon|Altaria}} |Pokemon 2 Name = Altaria |Pokemon 2 Gender = {{Male}} |Pokemon 2 Level = 63 |Pokemon 2 Ability = Natural Cure |Pokemon 2 Move 1 = Double Team |Pokemon 2 Move 2 = Dragonbreath |Pokemon 2 Move 3 = Perish Song |Pokemon 2 Move 4 = Hyper Beam}} {{Party/Pokemon |Pokemon 1 Image = {{Icon|Charizard}} |Pokemon 1 Name = Charizard |Pokemon 1 Gender = {{Male}} |Pokemon 1 Level = 64 |Pokemon 1 Ability = Blaze |Pokemon 1 Move 1 = Flamethrower |Pokemon 1 Move 2 = Wing Attack |Pokemon 1 Move 3 = Dragon Claw |Pokemon 1 Move 4 = Hyper Beam |Pokemon 2 Image = {{Icon|Flygon}} |Pokemon 2 Name = Flygon |Pokemon 2 Level = 65 |Pokemon 2 Ability = Levitate |Pokemon 2 Move 1 = Hyper Beam |Pokemon 2 Move 2 = Dragon Claw |Pokemon 2 Move 3 = Screech |Pokemon 2 Move 4 = Outrage}} |}


{{BattleDialogue |My child! How I have missed you. When I heard about the cave in, I rushed to clear all the underground pathways to search for you. I eventually stumbled upon Professor Ilk, who had been studying the strange seismic activities within the very same caves! He described to me a young Trainer who'd been trapped on Naljo's side of the mountains that befriended a tiny Larvitar and started up an adventure in the region. When I discovered it was you, my heart swelled with pride! I trusted that you alone would survive and overcome whatever obstacles lay before you. I had to trust that you alone would make wise decisions, without needing my guidance. Now that you've come to challenge me for my title, I will do all I can to make sure that you earn this honor. |Amazing! There is no one I'd rather relinquish my title to than to you! |Your Pokémon battle in a way where they anticipate all commands you make while trusting your ability to read the battlefield. Your potential is limitless, and it will continue to grow as you and your Pokémon grow old together. To think you've defeated your old man at such a young age! Let's head to the Hall of Fame room right away! }} ===20 Badges===

''Same as with 8 badges but 30 levels higher''
